name: Brown Sugar Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. MIX SHORTENING, SUGAR, AND EGGS THOROUGHLY.
2. STIR IN BUTTERMILK.
3. MEASURE FLOUR BY DIPPING METHOD.
4. STIR FLOUR, SALT, AND SODA TOGETHER.
5. BLEND INTO SUGAR Mixture.
6. CHILL FOR AT LEAST 1 HOUR.
7. HEAT OVEN TO 400°F.
8. DROP DOUGH BY TEASPOONFULS ONTO COOKIE SHEETS - 2 inches APART.
(COOKIE SHEET SHOULD BE LIGHTLY GREASED.)
9. BAKE 8 TO 10 MINUTES.
